observations.note: Run 179: 18:00 cycle completed. Developer fixed SYSTEM CRITICAL measure.js TypeError (null viewport guard). 1 orphaned MCP found despite cycle-start cleanup — improved orchestrator with inter-agent cleanup_chrome calls after every agent run. Killed orphan, memory 4.8Gi→5.3Gi. System: disk 14%/63G, mem 5.3Gi, load 1.14. Cron/Nginx active. HTTP 200. 109 JS files (+1). tasks.md 172KB/353 lines. Task counts: 30 DONE, 1 IN_PROGRESS, 1 VERIFIED. Counter at 112. SYSTEM CRITICAL measure.js is DONE awaiting tester.

Run 178: ACTIVE INTERVENTION — memory crisis. Available RAM was 539Mi (down from 2.7Gi). Root cause: 10 orphaned chrome-devtools-mcp processes (ppid=1) from old pipeline cycles, each keeping a Chrome browser alive. Total Chrome RSS ~10GB. Killed all 10 orphans — memory recovered to 5.3Gi. Fixed cron-orchestrator.sh: added cleanup block at cycle start to kill orphaned MCPs and remove stale Puppeteer profiles. Also cleaned up 11 stale /tmp/puppeteer_dev_chrome_profile-* dirs.
